description: Apply all branding changes to the standalone 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' file at the project root. This is a saved webpage copy with embedded CSS and base64-encoded images. Apply the same rebranding changes that were already done to stella/index.html.
steps: In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Replace ALL instances of 'Stella Elsya' with 'Petrus Jakub' (in title, meta tags, og tags, twitter tags, savepage meta, nav brand, footer, etc.)
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Replace ALL instances of 'Senior Manulife Agent' with 'Partner Bisnis Manulife'
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Replace ALL WhatsApp numbers: change '6282255291890' to '6287781896087' in all wa.me links and api.whatsapp.com links
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Change all WA message text parameters to 'Pak%20Petrus%20saya%20tertarik%20asuransi' (replace existing Halo texts)
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Change brand-mark letter from 'S' to 'P' (the S)
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Hero section: change 'Selama 19 tahun, saya membantu' to 'Selama 10 tahun lebih di industri asuransi, saya membantu'
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Footer: change '19 tahun mengawal' to '10 tahun lebih mengawal'
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Footer: change tel link and display from '6282255291890' / '+62 822-5529-1890' to '6287781896087' / '+62 877-8189-6087'
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Footer: change 'Kalimantan Barat, Indonesia' to 'Jakarta, Indonesia'
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Footer bottom: remove '| Certified Financial Planner' text
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Footer bottom: change 'Copyright 2026 Stella Elsya' to 'Copyright 2026 Petrus Jakub'
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Achievement section: Remove the entire year-list div from the MDRT recognition-card (the one with spans 2012-2018)

In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Achievement section: Remove the entire COT recognition-card article (the one with class 'recognition-card highlight' containing COT h3 and years 2019-2025)
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Agent's Pick section: change MUHC product card link from wa.me/6282255291890 to 'https://haipetrus.netlify.app/'
In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Products section: change the MiUltimate HealthCare product card's button link from wa.me to 'https://haipetrus.netlify.app/'

In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Add the CSS for .floating-wa and .sticky-wa-banner inside the existing <style> tag (copy from stella/styles.css: the .sticky-wa-banner and .floating-wa rules). Also add body padding-bottom: 56px rule.

In 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' - Trust section feature card: change '19 Tahun Pengalaman' to '10 Tahun Lebih Pengalaman' and update paragraph to mention a decade instead of two decades
acceptance_criteria: No instance of 'Stella Elsya' remains in the standalone HTML file (excluding the filename itself)
No instance of 'Senior Manulife Agent' remains
No instance of 'Certified Financial Planner' remains
No instance of '19 tahun' or '19 Tahun' remains
MDRT card has no year-list div
MUHC and MiUltimate HealthCare links point to https://haipetrus.netlify.app/
Floating WA icon and sticky banner HTML are present
CSS for floating-wa and sticky-wa-banner is present in the style tag
verification: Run: grep -n 'Stella Elsya' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should return nothing)
Run: grep -n '6282255291890' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should return nothing)
Run: grep -n 'Kalimantan Barat' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should return nothing)
Run: grep -n 'Certified Financial Planner' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should return nothing)
Run: grep -n 'Senior Manulife Agent' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should return nothing)
Run: grep -n 'COT' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should return nothing)
Run: grep -n 'floating-wa' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should show floating WA elements)
Run: grep -n 'sticky-wa-banner' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should show sticky banner elements)
Run: grep -n 'haipetrus.netlify.app' 'Stella Elsya _ Senior Manulife Agent.html' (should show MUHC links)
findings: All branding changes applied successfully to standalone HTML file. The file contains stellaelsya.com domain URLs in meta tags and saved-page references which were not changed (domain ownership is unchanged). Base64-encoded images were not touched. COT text found in grep results is from within base64-encoded MDRT logo image data, not actual page content.
